item.title: Repairing a Cat 785 Dog Bone Linkage
item.description: A Cat 785 dump truck receives critical repair work on its dog bone linkage to restore safe articulation and movement. What stresses lead to this kind of wear?

media:content.media:title: Repairing a Cat 785 Dog Bone Linkage
media:content.media:description: A Cat 785 dump truck receives critical repair work on its dog bone linkage to restore safe articulation and movement. What stresses lead to this kind of wear?

item.title: Blade Yoke Repair on an 11-Tonne Machine
item.description: Repair work focuses on restoring a worn or broken blade yoke to bring an 11-tonne machine back into service. How important is this component for proper blade control?

media:content.media:title: Blade Yoke Repair on an 11-Tonne Machine
media:content.media:description: Repair work focuses on restoring a worn or broken blade yoke to bring an 11-tonne machine back into service. How important is this component for proper blade control?

item.title: 90-Tonne Excavator Tilt Bracket Repair
item.description: Major structural repair work restores a damaged tilt bracket on a 90-tonne excavator using heavy fabrication and precision alignment. What caused the failure in such a critical component?

media:content.media:title: 90-Tonne Excavator Tilt Bracket Repair
media:content.media:description: Major structural repair work restores a damaged tilt bracket on a 90-tonne excavator using heavy fabrication and precision alignment. What caused the failure in such a critical component?

item.title: Completing and Testing a Heavy-Duty Parts Washer
item.description: The final build is put through real testing to confirm cleaning performance, flow, and durability under workshop conditions. Does it perform as expected under load?

media:content.media:title: Completing and Testing a Heavy-Duty Parts Washer
media:content.media:description: The final build is put through real testing to confirm cleaning performance, flow, and durability under workshop conditions. Does it perform as expected under load?

item.title: Saved From Scrap: Telescopic Cylinder Repair
item.description: A double-acting telescopic cylinder is brought back from scrap through careful repair and machining. The process highlights precision workshop work and practical engineering problem-solving.

media:content.media:title: Saved From Scrap: Telescopic Cylinder Repair
media:content.media:description: A double-acting telescopic cylinder is brought back from scrap through careful repair and machining. The process highlights precision workshop work and practical engineering problem-solving.

item.title: Repairing a Broken D10 Dozer Eye
item.description: A damaged D10 bulldozer eye undergoes heavy repair work involving machining, welding, and precision restoration. How much stress can components like this handle in the field?

media:content.media:title: Repairing a Broken D10 Dozer Eye
media:content.media:description: A damaged D10 bulldozer eye undergoes heavy repair work involving machining, welding, and precision restoration. How much stress can components like this handle in the field?

item.title: Megabore Upgrade Hits a Snag
item.description: Unexpected issues interrupt progress during a major Megabore machine upgrade project. What caused the setback, and how will it be fixed?

media:content.media:title: Megabore Upgrade Hits a Snag
media:content.media:description: Unexpected issues interrupt progress during a major Megabore machine upgrade project. What caused the setback, and how will it be fixed?

item.title: Building a Heavy-Duty Tool Post Grinder
item.description: A custom tool post grinder is built for precision machining applications and improved workshop capability. What advantages does a setup like this bring to machining work?

media:content.media:title: Building a Heavy-Duty Tool Post Grinder
media:content.media:description: A custom tool post grinder is built for precision machining applications and improved workshop capability. What advantages does a setup like this bring to machining work?

item.title: Heavy-Duty Parts Washer Complete
item.description: The custom heavy-duty parts washer is finally completed and ready for workshop cleaning and restoration work. How well will it handle years of grime and grease?

media:content.media:title: Heavy-Duty Parts Washer Complete
media:content.media:description: The custom heavy-duty parts washer is finally completed and ready for workshop cleaning and restoration work. How well will it handle years of grime and grease?

item.title: Restoring a Worn Cylinder Barrel
item.description: A repair project focused on restoring a worn hydraulic cylinder barrel through machining and precision workshop techniques. The video follows the process of bringing damaged components back into working condition. Why are restoration projects so satisfying to watch?

media:content.media:title: Restoring a Worn Cylinder Barrel
media:content.media:description: A repair project focused on restoring a worn hydraulic cylinder barrel through machining and precision workshop techniques. The video follows the process of bringing damaged components back into working condition. Why are restoration projects so satisfying to watch?

item.title: Machining the Mother of All Cutters
item.description: A large-scale machining project focused on producing and refining an oversized industrial cutter. The video highlights precision work, heavy equipment, and workshop craftsmanship. What’s the most impressive machining setup you’ve seen?

media:content.media:title: Machining the Mother of All Cutters
media:content.media:description: A large-scale machining project focused on producing and refining an oversized industrial cutter. The video highlights precision work, heavy equipment, and workshop craftsmanship. What’s the most impressive machining setup you’ve seen?

item.title: Meet MOAC in the Workshop
item.description: An introduction to MOAC, a large workshop machine or project featured during heavy fabrication and repair work. The video explores its role, capabilities, and workshop use. What’s the most impressive workshop machine you’ve seen?

media:content.media:description: An introduction to MOAC, a large workshop machine or project featured during heavy fabrication and repair work. The video explores its role, capabilities, and workshop use. What’s the most impressive workshop machine you’ve seen?

item.title: CAT D10 Dozer Cylinder Rebuild
item.description: A heavy equipment rebuild project focused on restoring a hydraulic cylinder from a CAT D10 dozer. The video highlights machining, repair work, and workshop techniques. What makes large equipment rebuilds so satisfying to watch?

media:content.media:title: CAT D10 Dozer Cylinder Rebuild
media:content.media:description: A heavy equipment rebuild project focused on restoring a hydraulic cylinder from a CAT D10 dozer. The video highlights machining, repair work, and workshop techniques. What makes large equipment rebuilds so satisfying to watch?

item.title: Vertical Bore Welding on the Mill
item.description: Using a Sir Meccanica WS2 portable bore welder, the bores are welded vertically while still on the mill. A precise workshop process that keeps the repair in place and the machining aligned. How does

item.title: Kurtis works through the Franna Winch Project
item.description: A workshop update following progress on a Franna winch project involving fabrication, repair work, and mechanical problem-solving. The video highlights hands-on engineering and workshop planning. What part of heavy equipment projects interests you most?

media:content.media:title: Kurtis works through the Franna Winch Project
media:content.media:description: A workshop update following progress on a Franna winch project involving fabrication, repair work, and mechanical problem-solving. The video highlights hands-on engineering and workshop planning. What part of heavy equipment projects interests you most?

item.title: Building a fume extraction system for metal arc
item.description: A fabrication project focused on building a fume extraction system for metal arc work in the workshop. The video covers design, construction, and improving workspace safety. What workshop upgrade would you add first?

media:content.media:title: Building a fume extraction system for metal arc
media:content.media:description: A fabrication project focused on building a fume extraction system for metal arc work in the workshop. The video covers design, construction, and improving workspace safety. What workshop upgrade would you add first?

item.title: Replacing Old Bushings with New Ones
item.description: A workshop maintenance project focused on removing worn bushings and installing new replacements. The video highlights repair techniques and equipment restoration work. How important is preventative maintenance for heavy equipment?

media:content.media:title: Replacing Old Bushings with New Ones
media:content.media:description: A workshop maintenance project focused on removing worn bushings and installing new replacements. The video highlights repair techniques and equipment restoration work. How important is preventative maintenance for heavy equipment?
